cleavage agent: digested with trypsin in 25 mM NH4HCO3 overnight at 37 °C
collision energy: HCD fragmentation at 30 V using nitrogen
enrichment method: we subjected cytoplasmic extracts from WI/R and normal liver tissues to co-immunoprecipitation (co-IP) for enrichment
fractionation method: the co-IP eluates were subjected to 2-dimensional electrophoresis (2DE) and mass spectrometry (MS)
fragmentation method: high-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) fragmentation at 30 V
instrument: injected into an Ultimate 3000 nano RSLC system coupled to a QExactive Plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: The spray voltage of the Nanospray Flex Ion Source was set to 2.2 kV
